title: tarenna pallidula var. oligoneura
intro: Tarenna pallidula var. oligoneura is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Tarenna pallidula var. oligoneura include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine in its native regions to treat a range of ailments.
